title: Iqbal Verse #90 — Allama Iqbal Urdu Shayari
content:
بلندی آسمانوں میں، زمینوں میں تری پستی
روانی بحر میں، اُفتادگی تیری کنارے میں

— Translation —
Thy elegance exists in skies’ heights, and in earths’ depths
It is in the ocean’s flow, and in falling behind of the shore
meaning: "Iqbal Verse #90" by Allama Iqbal is a deep urdu poem consisting of 6 lines. This Urdu verse by Allama Iqbal showcases the rich tradition of South Asian poetry. The poet masterfully employs Urdu literary conventions to convey profound emotional depth. Beginning with "بلندی آسمانوں میں، زمینوں میں تری پستی روانی بحر میں، اُفتادگی تیری کنارے میں...", this piece explores themes of deep through vivid imagery and emotional resonance. The work invites contemplation on the deeper currents of life, love, and the human condition. Allama Iqbal's celebrated body of poetry continues to inspire readers across generations and cultures, and this particular work stands as a powerful example of their artistic vision.
